message:
feat(cluster): implement real GETKEYSINSLOT and COUNTKEYSINSLOT with keyspace scanning

Move crc16_slot() and CRC16 table from fr-command to fr-store as a public
function, enabling Store::keys_in_slot() and Store::count_keys_in_slot()
to scan the live keyspace for keys matching a given cluster hash slot.

CLUSTER GETKEYSINSLOT and COUNTKEYSINSLOT now return real results instead
of hardcoded empty/zero responses. Also adds proper arity validation for
both subcommands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
